channel.title: enola.bedard TikTok
channel.description: OK Boomer, all the latest TikToks from enola.bedard

item.title: No Title
item.description: No Description
item.author: enola.bedard

item.title: GOGOYA music video OUT NOW!!!! Go Watch it on my YouTube Channel 🔥🙌🏻🤩 #newmusic #googya

item.title: Replying to @Ken Bradley You might know me from all of my dances but I also make music🤩🔥🙌🏻 go check out my new song GOGOYA!! Out now! #gogoya
item.description: Replying to @Ken Bradley You might know me from all of my dances but I also make music🤩🔥🙌🏻 go check out my new song GOGOYA!! Out now! #gogoya
item.author: enola.bedard

item.title: In honor of the new Michael Jackson movie I had to repost this one. Who remembers when I did a full tribute video to Michael Jackson??? Should I repost the full thing??? #michaeljackson #scream
item.description: In honor of the new Michael Jackson movie I had to repost this one. Who remembers when I did a full tribute video to Michael Jackson??? Should I repost the full thing??? #michaeljackson #scream
item.author: enola.bedard

item.title: Is she vacuuming the grass?!? Ahahah I guess I am 🙊😂🙌🏻 gogoya out now

item.author: enola.bedard

item.title: Replying to @nikkitorowski meaning of my new song GOGOYA when we wrote it 😂🙌🏻 so like the birds you gotta GOGOYA to have me!! #gogoya

item.title: 🔥NEW DANCE CHALLENGE🔥 learn this dance and tag me in your videos🤩🙌🏻 will reshare my favourites and maybe select dancers for my next project!!! Jump on the opportunity🙏🙏🙏
item.description: 🔥NEW DANCE CHALLENGE🔥 learn this dance and tag me in your videos🤩🙌🏻 will reshare my favourites and maybe select dancers for my next project!!! Jump on the opportunity🙏🙏🙏

item.title: It has been one week since GOGOYA has been out 🤩🙌🏻❤️🫶🏻 who downloaded it??? Go add it now to your favourite playlist!!

item.title: Excited for the game tonight!!!! Brazil X Canada 🤩🙌🏻 I had to hit this dance 🔥

item.author: enola.bedard

item.title: Happy Mother’s Day to the BEST MOM IN THE WORLD!!!! We changed our lives together and can’t wait to keep living our best life together and realize all of our dreams love you ❤️❤️❤️ #mothersday @Hélène Enola’smom
item.description: Happy Mother’s Day to the BEST MOM IN THE WORLD!!!! We changed our lives together and can’t wait to keep living our best life together and realize all of our dreams love you ❤️❤️❤️ #mothersday @Hélène Enola’smom
item.author: enola.bedard

item.title: Spend the day with me in a busy day 🫶🏻🤩❤️ also I’m currently planning some SHOWS🤩🤩 comment which city I should come to this summer!

item.author: enola.bedard

item.title: Replying to @dory.bonanno7 This is how ready I am for the @FIFA World Cup 🤩🙌🏻 help me tag @Shakira in the comments!!! My biggest dream would be to dance with her one day!! #fifa #worldcup #shakira
item.description: Replying to @dory.bonanno7 This is how ready I am for the @FIFA World Cup 🤩🙌🏻 help me tag @Shakira in the comments!!! My biggest dream would be to dance with her one day!! #fifa #worldcup #shakira

item.title: Replying to @𝚓𝚒𝚑𝚊𝚗𝚎 when the queen @Shakira reposted my video🥹🤩🙌🏻🔥 should I recreate this dance in public???? Let me know in the comments where should I go!! #daidai #shakira #worldcup

item.title: The way they all joined in!!!🔥🔥🙌🏻 @Sean Paul just dropped a new song and you know I had to make a dance to it!!!! Dc: me🙌🏻 stay tuned for this week’s new concept video!!! Guess what we filmed?!? #seanpaul #dance #reaction

item.title: When we recreated the @Shakira fifa world cup dance in public 🤩 help us tag her in the comments it would be a DREAM to dance with her at the @FIFA World Cup #shakira #fifaworldcup #behindthescenes comment for the results!!!!
item.description: When we recreated the @Shakira fifa world cup dance in public 🤩 help us tag her in the comments it would be a DREAM to dance with her at the @FIFA World Cup #shakira #fifaworldcup #behindthescenes comment for the results!!!!
item.author: enola.bedard

item.title: Replying to @K E N 🦅 It’s OFFICIAL!! Just got invited by @Shakira to perform with her at the finals🤩🙌🏻🔥 this is a dream come true I CAN’T BELIEVE IT!!!!! #shakira #fifaworldcup @FIFA World Cup go watch the full video on my YouTube Channel
item.description: Replying to @K E N 🦅 It’s OFFICIAL!! Just got invited by @Shakira to perform with her at the finals🤩🙌🏻🔥 this is a dream come true I CAN’T BELIEVE IT!!!!! #shakira #fifaworldcup @FIFA World Cup go watch the full video on my YouTube Channel
item.author: enola.bedard

item.title: Im telling you guys so many stuff happens when I shoot this dance….😏🤣 @augustogimenez @Nicolle Figueroa dc: @tracy.oj

item.author: enola.bedard

item.title: Dancing next to @JLO was a dream come true! What a great way to start the year. Who is gonna learn this dance??? #CantGetEnough @DYNAMIC LEGENDS @Baby lawd jiggy boss @kidmac10
item.description: Dancing next to @JLO was a dream come true! What a great way to start the year. Who is gonna learn this dance??? #CantGetEnough @DYNAMIC LEGENDS @Baby lawd jiggy boss @kidmac10

item.title: When we did a FULL OUT concept video to Jet Ski in public 👀 wait for the reactions ahahha! Who wanna see the results????? Full video out TOMORROW cant wait🇧🇷🔥🙌🏻 #jetski #behindthescenes #brazil
item.description: When we did a FULL OUT concept video to Jet Ski in public 👀 wait for the reactions ahahha! Who wanna see the results????? Full video out TOMORROW cant wait🇧🇷🔥🙌🏻 #jetski #behindthescenes #brazil
item.author: enola.bedard
